results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: STATE-REPRESSION-IN-FLUX (SCORABLE). The cycle's only change proposal. 6th consecutive week of nationwide protests against the worst economic crisis in four decades: 4 protesters KILLED, 127+ detained, and terrorism / narco-funding charges filed against COB labor-federation chief Mario Argullo and 24 other union leaders (AB1 deflection / AB4 weaponization). Defense and Education Ministers resigned June 2. As a non-floor Developing entity (28.4), the directly-attested deaths/detentions are NEW state-attributable harm revealing un-priced ACC (1.8->1.4), BND (2.3->1.9), EQU (1.9->1.6), EMP (2.4->2.0), INT (2.0->1.7); AWR/ACT/SYS held (apparatus stressed-not-collapsed). Defensible downgrade -5.6 (28.4 -> 22.8) clears the 5-point threshold while REMAINING in Developing (no band crossing). Subsequent reporting (10 killed / 365 arrested by June 9) corroborates and exceeds the modeled magnitude, confirming the proposal is conservative.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: DUPLICATE SUPPRESSED. A PENDING 2026-06-04 proposal (23.4 -> 17.5, Developing -> Critical) already prices the adjudicated Murphy/Cobb unlawful-conduct findings + record-pace ICE deaths + citizen fatalities. The 06-05 signal -- ICE rescinding the 30-day post-release death-reporting requirement (transparency degradation), the 17th detention death (~1/6 days), DEI disclosures down 65%, EEOC scrapping anti-discrimination tools -- is SAME-REGIME CONTINUATION that REINFORCES the proposed ACC 1.4 / INT 1.5 floor but does NOT materially change the -5.9 magnitude. No duplicate created; logged as corroborating evidence for the pending proposal's human review.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: PRICED-IN-RECENT-ADJUSTMENT confirm at 15.6 (applied 2026-06-01). The expulsion of Bengali Muslims to Bangladesh escalated to ~5,000 deportees (from 1,500+), with HRW reporting citizens expelled without verification, abuse at gunpoint, and 145 reportedly disappeared. This deepens an EQU 1.3 / EMP 1.4 / ACC 1.4 profile set days earlier; reinforces rather than reveals NEW un-priced harm. Confirm (avoids re-litigating the 06-01 adjustment). The 145 disappearance reports are a watch item -- if confirmed as state-attributable enforced disappearances at scale, becomes newly scorable.

results.name: Israel
results.key_finding: AUTHORIZED-RESUMPTION-AT-FLOOR. 856 Palestinians killed since the Oct 2025 ceasefire (HRW: 'curbs aid, kills civilians during ceasefire'); Feb 28 closure cut weekly trucks 4,200 -> 590; 37 aid groups banned; West Bank 36,000+ displaced, 1,732 settler-violence incidents. Active-perpetration harm encoded by the absolute 0.0 floor; reinforces, cannot move lower.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: SCALE-FLOOR confirm at 2.5. 612 executions in 2026 (ABC); June 1 secret executions of Kurdish prisoners Maleki/Mohammadinia; June 3 execution of January-protester Avari; hunger strikes at 56 facilities for 123 weeks; 41+ protesters at risk. Deepens a single dominant extremity already priced; does not meet the multi-category absolute-0.0 threshold. Reinforces; no movement below the floor-adjacent anchor.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: NATURAL-DISASTER-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT confirm at near-floor 2.3. Ebola Bundibugyo escalated to 515 cases / 91 deaths (from 381/64 on 06-04); Uganda spread (19/2); PHEIC; CDC worst-case 20,000; only 20% contact-tracing; 26.5M concurrent hunger; no vaccine. Exogenous shock revealing priced state-response incapacity, absent documented deliberate obstruction. Disambiguation re-confirmed (composite-2.3, rank 181 = DRC, NOT Republic of Congo rank 148/20.3).

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED confirm-with-watch at 10.2. DOJ criminal+civil MA-fraud probe, AZ AG June 1 cartel suit (8 insurers + MultiPlan), MA court greenlit antitrust suit (Mar 2026), active AI-denial class action. Raises enforcement density, corroborates decade-long upcoding, but remains pre-adjudication; reinforces the near-floor ACC 1.125/EQU 1.25 profile. Modeled -2.0 sub-threshold.

results.name: Oracle Corporation
results.key_finding: WARN-HELD-NOT-SCORABLE boundary confirm at 20.6 (0.6pt above Critical). June 15 sign-or-forfeit deadline (~30,000 workers) materializes an already-priced layoff; retroactive 'remote' reclassification disputed; WA/MO investigations FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED. Adverse WARN-avoidance adjudication would likely push into Critical.

results.name: 3M Company
results.key_finding: FILED-BUT-UNADJUDICATED + ADJUDICATED-PRIOR-REPARATION boundary confirm at 20.3 (0.3pt above Critical). Australia $1.43B suit (filed May 28, largest-ever), Minnesota MPCA Cottage Grove suit (310,000 ppt), 15,232 MDL claims, Phase-2 July 31 deadline. New harm filed-but-unadjudicated; settled prior reparation ($850M MN / A$408M AU) holds ACC above floor. Modeled -2.3 sub-threshold; adverse merits/settlement or rejection of military-immunity defense converts to scorable.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 2 Kyiv attack killed 22 civilians incl. children (656 drones + 73 missiles); Putin rejected peace talks June 6; 60,659 UN-verified civilian casualties (15,850 killed) since 2022. Reinforces, cannot move lower.

results.name: Myanmar
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 1 junta airstrikes on IDP camps in Ramree/Taungup (Rakhine) while residents slept -- 2 killed, 5+ injured; 4 heavy bombs on Kyaung Cha Twin camp. Continuing civilian-targeting pattern. Reinforces, cannot move lower.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: CONFLICT-DRIVEN-FAMINE-AT-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. Fourth year of civil war; 19.5M acutely food-insecure, 135,000 IPC-5, 14 famine-risk areas; UN fact-finding cites RSF 'hallmarks of genocide' against Zaghawa/Fur in El Fasher; 9M displaced. State-attributable access constraint sustains the floor. Reinforces.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: ATTRIBUTION-NON-STATE-ACTOR-AT-FLOOR confirm at 0.0. June 7 HRW+Amnesty demand release of 73 UN/CSO staff detained by Houthis since 2024; UNSC June 6 condemnation; WFP terminated 365 staff contracts; a Houthi-detained WFP staffer DIED in custody; 18.3M food-insecure. The detainee death is a new gravity marker within the Houthi-perpetrated in-territory harm the floor already encodes. Reinforces.

results.name: Afghanistan
results.key_finding: ACTIVE-PERPETRATION-FLOOR + NATURAL-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT confirm at 0.0. June 8 SC briefing: 4.7M at risk of severe food insecurity (+50% YoY), 21.9M need aid, 3.8M girls out of school (codified gender persecution), appeal 10% funded, Hormuz closure choking access. Hormuz shock is an exogenous overlay (non-double-counted); UNAMA June 17 is an external milestone. Reinforces.

results.name: Syria
results.key_finding: CONFLICT-DRIVEN-AT-FLOOR + NATURAL-OVERLAY-NON-DOUBLE-COUNT confirm at 0.0. 15.6M need aid; appeal 18% funded; WFP halved food assistance (1M without support); 390,000+ Lebanon returnees; Hormuz closure raising food/fuel costs; April dam collapse displaced ~280. Hormuz shock is an exogenous overlay; donor shortfall is external, not a conduct improvement. Reinforces.

results.key_finding: Rotation confirm at 37.5 (never previously assessed; no acute event). Stable Developing; EQU 2.0 single laggard (Darien transit pressures priced). Reconstruction EXACT; no math-hygiene flag.

results.name: Kenya
results.key_finding: PRICED-CONTINUATION rotation confirm at 35.9 (never previously assessed). HRW World Report 2026: crackdowns on protesters, plain-clothes abductions/torture/disappearances, June-2025 in-custody death of blogger Albert Ojwang -- consistent with the EQU 2.0/BND-ACC 2.5 profile already encoded; no NEW acute 06-05 spike. Reconstruction EXACT. Watch: mass-casualty protest event or scaled enforced disappearances -> scorable (state-repression logic).

data_hygiene_flags.note: Published at the absolute 0.0 floor (all dimensions 1.0, harm-flag override). New adverse 06-05 evidence reinforces but cannot move the floor; no proposal possible.

methodology_rulings.ruling: Bolivia is a non-floor Developing entity (28.4) where the June 2026 evidence supplies NEW state-attributable harm: 4 protesters killed, 127+ detained over a 6th consecutive week of nationwide protests against the worst economic crisis in four decades, and terrorism / narco-funding charges against COB labor-federation chief Mario Argullo + 24 union leaders (AB1 deflection / AB4 weaponization of the justice apparatus). Ministerial resignations (June 2) indicate a functioning-but-stressed apparatus, not collapse. The directly-attested deaths/detentions (Tier 2-3) are scorable harm distinct from filed-but-unadjudicated corporate matters and conflict-driven floors. Defensible multi-dimension downgrade (ACC 1.8->1.4, BND 2.3->1.9, EQU 1.9->1.6, EMP 2.4->2.0, INT 2.0->1.7; AWR/ACT/SYS held) reaches -5.6 (28.4 -> 22.8), clearing the 5-point threshold while REMAINING in Developing (no band crossing). Subsequent reporting (10 killed / 365 arrested by June 9) corroborates and exceeds the modeled magnitude, confirming the proposal is conservative. Confidence medium: evolving situation, charges filed-not-adjudicated -- magnitude rests on attested deaths/detentions, not charge outcomes.

A PENDING 2026-06-04 proposal (23.4 -> 17.5, Developing -> Critical) already prices the adjudicated Murphy/Cobb unlawful-conduct findings + record-pace ICE deaths + citizen fatalities. The 06-05 ICE rescission of the 30-day post-release death-reporting requirement is an AB2 transparency-degradation that REINFORCES the proposed ACC 1.4 / INT 1.5 floor but is same-regime continuation that does NOT materially change the -5.9 magnitude. Per instruction, no duplicate proposal created; logged as corroborating evidence for the pending proposal's human review.

India was downgraded to 15.6 (Critical) via the applied 2026-06-01 proposal pricing the discriminatory mass-expulsion pattern. The 06-05 escalation (1,500+ -> ~5,000 deportees; citizens expelled without verification; abuse at gunpoint; 145 reportedly disappeared) deepens an EQU 1.3/EMP 1.4/ACC 1.4 profile set days earlier and reinforces rather than reveals NEW un-priced harm. Confirm; no proposal (also avoids re-litigating the 06-01 adjustment). The 145 disappearance reports are a watch item -- if confirmed as state-attributable enforced disappearances at scale, becomes newly scorable.

Active-perpetration / authorized-resumption harm encoded by the absolute 0.0 floor (harm-flag override). Reinforces, cannot move lower; no proposal possible.

Sudan (19.5M food-insecure, 135,000 IPC-5, RSF 'hallmarks of genocide' in El Fasher), Syria (15.6M need; WFP halved support; Hormuz cost shock), Afghanistan (4.7M at severe food-insecurity risk +50% YoY; codified gender persecution; Hormuz shock). The Strait-of-Hormuz closure (sector_alert: 45M more at risk; Brent peaked $126/bbl) is an EXOGENOUS overlay revealing priced incapacity -- NOT double-counted across Afghanistan/Syria/Sudan. All sustain the 0.0 floor; reinforce.

Confirm at 35.9. Converts on a documented mass-casualty protest event or scaled enforced disappearances (state-repression logic, cf. Bolivia/US).

framing_corrections.correction: The published 28.4 (Developing) priced a fragile-but-functional state with chronic economic stress. The June 2026 evidence supplies the missing STATE-REPRESSION element (lethal force against protesters, mass detention, criminalization of labor leadership) moving the entity from a priced-continuation profile to a scorable downgrade (28.4 -> 22.8) WITHIN the Developing band. This cycle's only change proposal; the clearest demonstration that NEW state-attributable lethal repression of dissent is scorable even where the apparatus has not collapsed to a floor.

top_3_most_consequential_findings.finding: The cycle's only change proposal and a NEW methodology ruling: STATE-REPRESSION-IN-FLUX (SCORABLE). 6 weeks of nationwide protests against the worst economic crisis in four decades met with lethal state force (4 killed, 127+ detained) and the criminalization of labor leadership (terrorism/narco charges vs COB chief Argullo + 24 leaders). As a non-floor Developing entity, the attested deaths/detentions reveal un-priced ACC/BND/EQU/EMP/INT harm; defensible downgrade -5.6 (28.4 -> 22.8) clears the threshold while remaining Developing. Subsequent reporting (10 killed/365 arrested by June 9) confirms the modeled magnitude is conservative.

DUPLICATE SUPPRESSED -- a disciplined non-action. The 06-05 ICE rescission of the 30-day death-reporting requirement (transparency degradation, 17th detention death) is same-regime continuation of the pattern already priced in the PENDING 06-04 proposal (23.4 -> 17.5). It reinforces the proposed ACC 1.4/INT 1.5 floor but does not change the magnitude; no duplicate created, logged for the pending proposal's review. Demonstrates the cycle's discipline against double-counting an open proposal.

Floor confirmation with a gravity escalation: a Houthi-detained WFP staffer DIED in custody amid the detention of 73 UN/CSO staff (UNSC June 6 condemnation; HRW/Amnesty June 7 release demand; WFP terminated 365 staff contracts). The death is a new marker within the Houthi-perpetrated in-territory harm already encoded by the ATTRIBUTION-NON-STATE-ACTOR 0.0 floor. Reinforces, cannot move lower; no proposal possible.
